title: [Bug]: Running a complex query encountered the "No join order generated" error.
poc: drop table if exists t0, t1, t2, t3, t4, t5, t6, t7, t8, t9, t10;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 FLOAT UNIQUE, c1 VARCHAR(123) , c2 INT ) PARTITION BY KEY (c0) WITH COLUMN GROUP (all columns, each column);

SELECT
    t5.c0, t8.c0, t0.c0, t0.c1, t0.c2,t4.c0
FROM t5, t8, t0, t4, t1, t3, t6, t7, t2, t9, t10
WHERE (((t8.c1) AND (t3.c0)) IS TRUE)
GROUP BY t5.c0,  t8.c0,  t0.c0, t4.c0,  t1.c0,  t3.c0, t6.c0,  t7.c0, t0.c1, t0.c2;

SELECT
    ->     t5.c0, t8.c0, t0.c0, t0.c1, t0.c2,t4.c0
    -> FROM t5, t8, t0, t4, t1, t3, t6, t7, t2, t9, t10
    -> WHERE (((t8.c1) AND (t3.c0)) IS TRUE)
    -> GROUP BY t5.c0,  t8.c0,  t0.c0, t4.c0,  t1.c0,  t3.c0, t6.c0,  t7.c0, t0.c1, t0.c2;
key_bug_features: Running complex queries with multiple tables and conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t11(c0 INT PRIMARY KEY, c1 FLOAT, c2 VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t12(c0 INT, c1 DATE, c2 BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, FOREIGN KEY (c0) REFERENCES t11(c0));
INSERT INTO t11(c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 3.14, 'test1'), (2, 2.71, 'test2');
INSERT INTO t12(c0, c1) VALUES (1, '2023-10-01'), (2, NULL);
SELECT t11.c0, t11.c1, t12.c1 FROM t11 LEFT JOIN t12 ON t11.c0 = t12.c0 WHERE t12.c1 IS NOT NULL OR t11.c2 = 'test1';
